General.Name: QEM Ltd
General.Description: QEM Limited engages in the exploration and development of vanadium and oil shale project in Australia. Its flagship project is the Julia Creek oil shale and vanadium project comprising 4 tenements covering an area of 249.6 square kilometers located in the Julia Creek area of North Western Queensland, Australia. The company was formerly known as Queensland Energy & Minerals Pty Ltd and changed its name to QEM Limited in August 2018. QEM Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Surfers Paradise, Australia.
General.Address: 50 Appel Street, Surfers Paradise, QLD, Australia, 4217
